empty.title: No virtual machines yet
empty.description: Create your first VM — Plexor brings it up on the chosen runtime.
empty.noResultsDescription: Try adjusting the filters or reset them.

new.title: Create virtual machine
new.description: VM-specific settings. Node and cluster are selected below.
new.nodeDescription: Only {{badge}} nodes accept new VMs. Pending/draining/offline are filtered out.
new.paramsDescription: Name, image, network and SSH key.
new.name: Name
new.nameDescription: Used as hostname. Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens.

noCluster.title: Plexor control plane is not registered
noCluster.description: To create VMs, you first need to install Plexor on a server. The installation sets up the control plane and registers it in the UI.

noReady.title: No ready nodes
noReady.description: Connect Plexor.NodeAgent to the cluster via a join token. After a heartbeat (≤ 2 min) the node appears here and you can create VMs.

new.title: Create Kubernetes cluster
new.description: Managed K3s on the Plexor fleet — control plane, node pools, networking and storage are all yours to set.

noCluster.title: Plexor control plane is not registered
noCluster.description: To create a Kubernetes cluster, you first need to install Plexor on a server. The installation sets up the control plane and registers it in the UI.

noReady.title: No ready nodes
noReady.description: Connect Plexor.NodeAgent to the cluster with a join token. After a heartbeat (≤ 2 min) the node appears here and you can host a Kubernetes cluster on it.

empty.title: No registered clusters
empty.description: Install Plexor on your server via {{code}} or an ISO image, then register the control plane here.

detail.notFoundDescription: Cluster with id {{id}} does not exist or was deleted.

preferences.title: Visual settings
preferences.description: Theme, accent color and text size. Saved in this browser.
